favorite.limitDescription: You can pin up to {max} servers. Remove one before adding another.

status.growthTooltip: This shows how the average player count this week compares to the average for the past 30 days. Positive values indicate growth.

stats.intervalNote: Based on the selected interval — currently {count, plural, one {# data point} other {# data points}}.

notFound.title: Server Not Found
notFound.description: The server you're looking for doesn't exist or has been removed.

join.question: How do I join the {name} Minecraft server?
join.answer: To join {name}, launch Minecraft and use the server address: {address}. Click "Multiplayer" in the main menu, then "Add Server", paste the address, and click "Done" to save. Then select the server and click "Join Server" to connect.

playersOnline.question: How many players are online on {name}?
playersOnline.answer: Currently, {count, plural, one {# player is} other {# players are}} online on {name} out of a maximum capacity of {maxPlayers} players. You can view real-time player statistics and historical data on this page.

version.question: What version of Minecraft does {name} support?
version.answerKnown: {name} is running Minecraft version {version}. Make sure your Minecraft client is compatible with this version to join the server.
version.answerUnknown: {name} supports multiple Minecraft versions. Check the server information above for the current version details.

online.question: Is {name} online and accessible?
online.answer: Yes, {name} is currently monitored every 10 minutes. The latest statistics show the server is {active, select, true {online with active players} other {online}}. Historical uptime and player count data is available on this page.

statistics.question: Can I see player statistics for {name}?
statistics.answer: Yes, this page provides comprehensive statistics for {name} including current player count, maximum players, historical player trends, daily and weekly growth statistics, and server uptime monitoring. Stats are updated every 10 minutes.

edit.heroSubtitle: Update your server's details and tracking settings.
edit.detailsSubtitle: Update your server's details, categories, and languages.
